prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading for endurance

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snacks)
Emphasizes high carbohydrate intake (55-65% of calories) to support endurance training
Includes adequate protein (1.2-1.6g per kg body weight) for recovery
Plan is concise and practical (formatted compactly without excessive detail)
task_description: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring maximum carbohydrate loading and sustained energy intake throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and muscle gains through optimized protein timing around weightlifting sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers one full day with at least 4 meals/snacks strategically timed around workout
Protein distributed across meals (minimum 25g per meal) totaling 1.6-2.2g per kg bodyweight
Pre-workout meal provided 1-2 hours before training with carbs and moderate protein
Post-workout nutrition included within 2 hours of training completion with protein and carbs
task_description: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing protein distribution and strategic pre/post-workout nutrition timing

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain lean muscle while optimizing power-to-weight ratio for climbing performance
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, no nuts due to allergy

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 3 meals covering a full day
Total daily calories align with weight maintenance for a 58kg athlete (approximately 1800-2000 kcal)
All meals are vegetarian and nut-free
Includes adequate protein distribution (minimum 90g daily) to support muscle retention
task_description: Write a compact concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a weight-conscious athlete (gymnast or rock climber) balancing caloric needs with performance optimization and body composition goals
